title: Strategies
noDataForPeriod: No data available for the selected period.
strategyRespectPercentageTooltip: This chart shows the percentage of respected and non-respected trades relative to the total number of trades for each period. The blue bar represents the % of trades where the strategy was respected, the pink bar represents the % of trades where the strategy was not respected.
successRateByStrategyRespectTooltip: This chart compares the success rate (winning trades) depending on whether the strategy was respected or not. The blue bar shows the % of winning trades when the strategy is respected, the pink bar shows the % of winning trades when the strategy is not respected.
winningSessionsDistribution: Distribution of winning sessions by TP reached
winningSessionsDistributionTooltip: This chart shows how winning sessions (profitable trades) are distributed according to the Take Profit reached. TP1: the first Take Profit was reached (regardless of whether TP2+ is also reached). TP2+: the second Take Profit or more was reached. Break-even: no Take Profit was reached but the trade is still profitable.
dominantEmotionsDistributionTooltip: This chart shows the distribution of dominant emotions felt during trades. Each segment represents the number of occurrences of an emotion. This helps identify the most frequent emotions during your trading sessions.
complianceEvolutionAllAccountsTooltip: Evolution of respect rate, calculated from individual strategies and respects (each strategy or respect counts as one unit). The blue curve represents the daily rate, while the pink dashed line corresponds to the cumulative average since the beginning. This calculation differs from the daily respect rate displayed at the top of the page.
complianceEvolutionSelectedAccountToolti: Evolution of respect rate, calculated from individual strategies and respects (each strategy or respect counts as one unit). The blue curve represents the daily rate, while the pink dashed line corresponds to the cumulative average since the beginning. This calculation differs from the daily respect rate displayed at the top of the page.
noDataForAccount: No data available for this account
complianceByWeekday: Strategy Compliance by Day of Week
complianceByWeekdayTooltip: Average respect rate for each day of the week. Blue days are when you respect your strategy best, pink days need improvement.

insights.gainIfTooltip:
For trades marked as not following the strategy: would you have won if you had followed the plan?

Captured in the journal ("Gain if strategy respected" field), for the active period and filters.
insights.gainIfSubtitle: Based on __COUNT__ non-compliant trades in the filtered period.
insights.gainIfNoDeviations: No non-compliant trades in this period — nothing to analyze here.
insights.gainIfInsight: On __ANSWERED__ answered trades, you estimate that following the plan would have produced a win __PCT__% of the time.
insights.emotionsByRespectTooltip: Frequency of dominant emotions reported, compared between compliant and non-compliant trades (filtered period). The same emotion can appear on multiple trades.
insights.noInsightsData: No deviation or emotion data for this period. Fill in compliance and emotions in the trade journal.
insights.completionTooltip:
Share of trades and trading days where you indicated whether the strategy was followed.

Unevaluated trades are excluded from respect rates shown elsewhere — low completion can skew analysis.
insights.completionSubtitle: Fully evaluated trades and days in the filtered period.
insights.completionWarning: __UNEVALUATED__ trade(s) and __DAYS__ day(s) partially or not evaluated — respect rates may be biased.

drillDown.openCompliance: Open discipline entry for this day

statsInsights.tradingMetricsSubtitle: Expectancy (average PnL per trade), profit factor, and sample-size guidelines (common heuristics, not a formal statistical test).
statsInsights.lowSampleStrongRespected: Strategy respected: {{count}} trade(s) — very small sample (under {{minStrong}}); win rate, expectancy, and profit factor are highly uncertain.
statsInsights.lowSampleStrongNotRespected: Strategy not respected: {{count}} trade(s) — very small sample (under {{minStrong}}); win rate, expectancy, and profit factor are highly uncertain.
statsInsights.lowSampleModerateRespected: Strategy respected: {{count}} trade(s) — still a limited sample (under {{minModerate}}); metrics become more reliable with more data.
statsInsights.lowSampleModerateNotRespected: Strategy not respected: {{count}} trade(s) — still a limited sample (under {{minModerate}}); metrics become more reliable with more data.
statsInsights.expectancyComparisonUnreliable: The expectancy gap is not shown until each group has at least {{minBoth}} trades.
statsInsights.disciplineSubtitle: Current streak, best streak, and day-by-day view (last 28 days of the selected window).
statsInsights.trendTitle: Compliance rate per trade (7, 30, 90 days and period)
statsInsights.trendSubtitle: 7 / 30 / 90-day windows are always calculated from today. Trade rate and totals follow your filters (account, period, strategy).
statsInsights.trendScopeTooltip: The rate cards at the top measure day-level compliance. Here, the trade rate counts each evaluated trade. Dashboard streaks use a rolling 12-month window, independent of these filters.
statsInsights.trendTooltip7d:
Trade-level compliance rate over the last 7 calendar days (from today).

Each evaluated trade counts as one unit. Account and position strategy filters apply; the period filter is ignored.
statsInsights.trendTooltip30d:
Trade-level compliance rate over the last 30 calendar days (from today).

Each evaluated trade counts as one unit. Account and position strategy filters apply; the period filter is ignored.
statsInsights.trendTooltip90d:
Trade-level compliance rate over the last 90 calendar days (from today).

Each evaluated trade counts as one unit. Account and position strategy filters apply; the period filter is ignored.
statsInsights.trendTooltipTradeLevel:
Trade-level compliance rate for the filtered period (account, period, position strategy).

Each evaluated trade counts as one unit, unlike the day-level cards at the top. Green / red figures show respected and non-respected trades.
statsInsights.tradeLevelRateHint: Share of evaluated trades where the strategy was followed, for the filtered period.
